intro.title: Relationship Memory Time Machine
intro.subtitle: A curated journey through Durriya and Maaz Siddiqui across messages, moods, and milestones.

selected_highlights.quote: honesgly mujhe itna khas nai laga ke ill ever find love toh i was like agar meri arrange honi hi hai tou baaki aab kuch uska perfect hona chahiye 😭😭😭😭😭😭😭😭 HAHAHAHAH
Thank you for telling ITNA detail mein (may everyday be like this hehehe) I love listening to you and your giggle and laugh. I love everything about you 🥺🫶🏻
Please forgive me for anything, any harm that I caused because of my words or actions. I'm genuinely sorry for anything and wish u nothing but the best. Take care and Allah Hafiz❤️

24041 Durriya Suhail: hii ayesha, can i keep my camera off today pls 😭 actually, ive been wearing the hijab since 9 am and just got back home n my head hurts way too bad so pls lmk if i can keep my camera off
I am so sorry about yesterday, genuinely sorry for hurting your feelings. You're such an amazing person fr and always the lively one 💓

one would assume ud pamper ur girl while shes on her period but yahan toh apse reply nai arha apparently ur too lazy u dont wanna talk u dont wann meet udc if im not replying properly or trying to tell if im upset

milestone_previews.title: A Strong Support Moment
milestone_previews.summary: A Strong Support Moment around May 16, 2024 with supportive tone and Everyday Life energy.
milestone_previews.representative_quote: Helloo Durr, ik your exams are tomorrow and you'd be super busy but i just wanted to drop a quick message to say how awesome you are for getting this far in the finals prep, seriously, your dedication is no joke, and I'm super proud of you! I know exams can be soo stressful specially when u have two in one day, but hey, you've totally got this, take a breather when you need it, okay? keep taking breaks and don't forget to keep telling urself u r proud. I'm sure you'll be balancing both subjects with perfection! Don't forget to take short breaks. netflix, snacks, texting—anything that makes you smile, you've aced prep, and you know your stuff, keep taking care of yourself and treat urself to nice food and sleep your brain deserves the full VIP setup. PROM bhi nikal jayega easily IA and Arabic like your baby. Please Please sleep early as your exam is early morning. Your mind needs to be well rested so you can ace both the exams back to back. It's gonna be challenging but my Durr is a warrior and she'll overcome anything!🩷 Also, if you need a study break buddy or just wanna vent, i'm here, you're not in this alone! You're going to crush it IA 🫶🏻 يا حبي، سوف تقوم بعمل رائع في امتحاناتك غدًا، لقد حصلت على هذا!

milestone_previews.title: A Tense Exchange
milestone_previews.summary: A Tense Exchange around Jun 28, 2024 with romantic tone and Affection energy.
milestone_previews.representative_quote: hi maazu, j before sleeping i was thinking abt how u cover up when u might be upset or having an off day, yet you're always there for me <3 ap bologe ap nai chuppate lekin bS 🙄🙄🙄 j want u to know that i love u so much words cant describe but also that i 100% believe in u and every single day im in awe and inspired by ur sabr and unconditional kindness, you're a wonderful and incredibly talented person allahuma barik dont ever doubt this 💗 you're going to achieve so much in life inshallah and ill be there w u for all of it 🥰 apki har baat mere liye behadh precious tareen hai and i appreciate u a lot n honestly i wish it was possible to show u just how much i cherish u 🙁❤️ mere words are not enough <3 but i hope it'll give u an idea :) khair,, never lose ur optimism, i adore it to bits 😚 hope youre sleeping welllll, ilysm 💗
